Inductive Miner Discovery — 20 Logs

Classes structured / semi-structured / loosely-structured. One run per log, plain Inductive Miner (noise_threshold = 0.0). Each log is shown as a Petri net and as the underlying process tree. Fitness/Precision/F1 computed with both conformance methods (alignments and token-based replay).

Note: At noise_threshold = 0.0 the Inductive Miner guarantees a model that can reproduce every trace in the log, so fitness is exactly 1.0 in all 20 cases. Because both conformance methods follow the same path through the net under perfect fitness, the alignments and token-replay values for fitness and precision coincide here. The discriminating metric is precision: structured ≈ 1.0, semi-structured clearly lower (underfitting / flower tendency), loosely mixed.

Discovery configuration (all 20 logs)
MinerInductive Miner (PM4Py)
Variantplain (IM), noise_threshold = 0.0
Modelprocess tree → Petri net
Conformancealignments and token-based replay (both)
Generalizationtoken-based (generalization)
Simplicityarc-degree
PM4Py version2.7.0
